coreCompetencies: Basic understanding of running a neural network on a device instead of the cloud

Elementary knowledge of measuring model size and inference time on a device
Ability to run a quantized model on a development board under supervision
Basic understanding of why edge devices have limited memory and compute

Elementary knowledge of reading latency and memory profiles
Basic understanding of the difference between training and on-device inference
complementaryCompetencies: Basic knowledge of Python and C fundamentals
Familiarity with microcontrollers or single-board computers
Elementary understanding of model file formats
indicators: Requires constant supervision
Can run existing conversion scripts with detailed guidance
Needs 3-6 months to be productive

coreCompetencies: Ability to apply post-training INT8 quantization and check accuracy loss

indicators: Can deploy simple models to devices independently
Resolves medium complexity issues in conversion and quantization
Actively participates in code reviews
